title: Titãs: A Vida Até Parece uma Festa
original_title: Titãs - A Vida Até Parece Uma Festa
overview: Brazilian documentary that tells the story of Titãs, the most famous rock band in the country. The film was directed by one of the members, Branco Mello, using images recorded from the early 80's until the present day.
